ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "original_id" INTEGER /* Original identifier for cross-referencing external sources */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many users have marked the post as favorite */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the post has been viewed */,
  "sdlc_stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SDLC stage related to the post */,
  "tag_ids" TEXT /* Array of IDs of tags associated with the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "is_problematic" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the post is problematic or contains issues */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sdlc_stages" (
  "sdlc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SDLC stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the SDLC stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SDLC stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sdlc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post marked as favorite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the post as favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the post */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problematic_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problematic post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who flagged the post */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the post */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problematic_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problematic_flags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_posts" INTEGER /* Total number of posts recorded */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of users registered */,
  "problematic_posts" INTEGER /* Total number of flagged problematic posts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., updated, deleted) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_history_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)
